label: Start
title: Moon Classroom Awakens
description: Leta presses the red button. Milo wakes up inside the blue hologram.

label: Stage 1
title: Signal Words
description: Match mission words: drone, signal, propeller, oxygen, console.

label: Stage 2
title: Repair Order
description: Choose the correct order to repair the drone signal path.

label: AI Challenge
title: Give Milo an English Command
description: Type a clear English instruction to stabilize the moon signal.

label: Boss
title: PIX AI Core
description: Use language to repair the unstable AI system.

label: Reward
title: Moon Signal Badge
description: Collect XP, AI Energy, and unlock the next mission route.
